description: Generates wrappers targeting Moq v4.20 specifically. Full API surface with all modern features. Best for greenfield projects or teams that have standardized on latest Moq 4.x.

rules.reason: Targeted strategy uses the complete API surface of the specified version.
Protected().As<TAnalog>() provides compile-time safety over string-based Setup. Wrapper should expose the type-safe variant as the primary API.
v4.20 feature allowing times specification at setup rather than at verify. Simplifies strict mock patterns.

rules.description: Include RaiseAsync for async event testing
rules.reason: v4.20 feature for raising async events. Essential for testing async event handlers.
Exposes recorded invocations for custom verification scenarios and diagnostics.

rules.description: Full Callback arity up to 16 parameters
rules.reason: v4.16+ supports Callback with up to 16 generic parameters.

notes: Targeted v4.20 wrappers require Moq >= 4.20.0. This is the recommended strategy for new projects. Provides complete API coverage including async event raising, invocation introspection, and type-safe protected member mocking.
